accessibilityTree:
- main:
  - region "Quick walk map viewport":
    - region "Map"
    - tabpanel "Explore":
      - button "Dismiss panel"
      - heading "Quick Walk Generator" [level=1]
      - paragraph: Dial in duration and interests to refresh suggestions.
      - button "Generate a new walk"
      - heading "Duration" [level=2]
      - text: 60 minutes
      - slider "Walk duration"
      - heading "Interests" [level=2]
      - text: 2 selected
      - toolbar "Select quick walk interests":
        - button "Parks & Nature"
        - button "Coffee Spots"
        - button "Street Art" [pressed]
        - button "Historic Sites"
        - button "Waterfront" [pressed]
        - button "Markets"
  - tablist:
    - tab "Explore" [selected]
    - tab "Stops"
    - tab "Notes"
  - button "Save quick walk"
  - navigation:
    - button "Map Map":
      - img "Map"
      - text: Map
    - button "Discover Discover":
      - img "Discover"
      - text: Discover
    - button "Routes Routes":
      - img "Routes"
      - text: Routes
    - button "Profile Profile":
      - img "Profile"
      - text: Profile
- button "Controls"
